title: 10 best herbal teas for inflamed mouth
description: Fennel teas helps with inflamed mouth because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which soothe and calm irritated tissues. The tea's antioxidants and flavonoids work to reduce swelling and ease discomfort, making it a natural remedy for reducing inflammation and pain in the mouth. Additionally, fennel's antibacterial properties help combat underlying infections that can contribute to inflamed mouths, promoting a healthy and balanced oral environment....
